texto: We have our own language. Christianese... We don't say 'He's out of his mind,' no, we say 'That's our youth pastor.
explicacao: Citação de Tim Hawkins sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We have our own language. Christianese... We don't say 'He's out of his mind,' no, we say 'That's…” articula humor, christianity, language em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como humor e language.

texto: Father, we come to You, Father, in the name of the Father, Father we come to You, Father, Father, just, just, Father, Father...' You don't talk to you friends like that. 'Ed, Ed, come over, Ed, Ed, Ed, you are, Ed, Ed, Ed, Ed, Ed, Ed, ooh, Ed, Ed, Ed' - he wouldn't be your friend anymore if you did that! Like, 'You keep saying Ed...my name's Joe!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tim Hawkins: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Father, we come to You, Father, in the name of the Father, Father we come to You, Father, Father,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, friends, humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e humor.
